goals: Explore what memories are currently stored in the system
Store a personal preference or fact about themselves
Search for stored memories to verify they were saved correctly
Clean up or delete an unnecessary test memory

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn. Prefers hands-on exploration over reading documentation. Asks follow-up questions to clarify understanding.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic concepts of memory and preferences but does not know the specific tool names or internal APIs. Needs guidance on how to interact with the memory system.

end_condition: The user has successfully added a personal preference, verified it was stored through search, and optionally cleaned up test memories. They understand how the memory system works through practical experience.
